title: Angiotensin-(1-7) suppresses pyroptosis in cerebral endothelium to decrease blood-brain barrier permeability and cognitive impairments in sepsis.
publicationName: The Journal of international medical research
journalName: The Journal of international medical research
snippet: ObjectiveThis study aimed to explore the influence of the angiotensin-(1-7)/Mas receptor and angiotensin II/angiotensin II type 1 receptor pathways on pyroptosis during sepsis and their subsequent effects on cognitive function.MethodsAdult C57BL/6 mice were subjected to cecal ligation and puncture to induce sepsis.
